title: Show by fragment requires uniqueness across workspace
description:
As a Kanbus user
I want kbs show <fragment> to fail when ambiguous across projects
So that I am forced to use a canonical key.

Feature: Workspace fragment resolution

Scenario: Fragment matches multiple issues
  Given a workspace with multiple projects
  And two issues share the same fragment
  When I run "kanbus show <fragment>"
  Then the command should fail with "ambiguous identifier"
creator: unknown

comments.author: unknown
comments.text: Added workspace ambiguous-fragment scenario; issue show now errors on ambiguous identifiers across projects. BDD green.
